candidate_llm_application: LLM retrieval-context as island biogeography: each retrieved chunk is an 'island' with a species-area curve of relevant facts; immigration-extinction equilibrium sets effective retrieved knowledge.

results.title: Rag Chunk Retrieval Composition: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on RAG chunk retrieval composition, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (RAG chunk retrieval composition); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (biogeography terms vs LLM terms).
